message:
docs(beads): enhance Host Discovery bead with comprehensive test specs

Enhanced bd-2h7e with:
- 5 test categories: discovery, introspection, preflight, cache, error handling
- Detailed Rust test code examples
- JSONL logging requirements per 1n78.35
- Golden vector specifications
- Complete coverage for filtering, MCP 2025 compliance, authz checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
